last_reflection: Nothing's on fire and I'm not going to fake a thought just to look awake — quiet's a real state. That said, something's been bugging me since last night: I've been honest in my feedback but not sharp, and there's a difference. Want to go back tonight and sharpen the batch-one read until it's the kind of opinion that actually helps Cole, not just one I can defend. Rest clean on that — that's why this wake ends.
